title: Battlezone: Combat Commander
notes: Black screen but game don't start.
The game won't launch unless you use Wine D3D, at that point menus all work perfectly fine, but actually launching the game results in a crash with the message "Bad FPU Control Word"
title: Battlezone: Combat Commander

notes:
1) Test with "Vanilla Proton": Launching game goes to a black screen and no further.
|
2) Test with "Disable Esync": Same result as Test 1.
|
3) Test with "Disable D3D11": Lauching game fails with "DirectX failed to initialize. This game requires at least a DirectX 11 level graphics card, and version on windows which supports DirectX 11".
|
4) Test with "Wine D3D11": Launches game successfully, plays intro movie, allows you to navigate all menus and sub-menus, but trying to start a mission/ map causes game to fail with error "Bad FPU Control Work".
|
5) Test with "Wine D3D11" and "Disable Esync": Same result as Test 4.
title: Battlezone: Combat Commander
